div1.entryFree:
Providence, 1) foresight, timely care: the p. that's in a watchful state, Troil. III, 3, 196. it will be laid to us, whose p. should have . . . restrained this mad young man, Hml. IV, 1, 17.
2) the care of God, divine dispensation: Tp. I, 2, 159. V, 189. Caes. V, 1, 107. Hml. V, 2, 231.
